growth_records.medium: SM2 submerged-fermentation medium with glucose as carbon source

up.units: g/g (only cell yield Yxs=0.375 reported; substrate fully consumed by end of fermentation; no per-time uptake rate given)

sec.method: HPLC of methanol cell extract; Luedeking-Piret model fit

growth_records.cite: Siddique et al. Kinetics of Avermectin B1b Production by Streptomyces avermitilis 41445 UV 45(m)3 in Shake Flask Culture. Iranian Journal of Biotechnology (2020). DOI:10.30498/IJB.2020.2356. [PMC8035423]
growth_records.snippet: Maximum specific growth rate (mu_max) (1.29 h-1) was obtained in medium having potato starch ... followed by glucose (0.8 h-1), maltose (0.34 h-1), wheat starch (0.24 h-1), lactose (0.16 h-1) and soluble corn starch (0.15 h-1).
growth_records.notes: Table 2 (effect of carbon source), SM2 medium with glucose as carbon substrate, pH 7.2+/-0.2, 150 rpm, 31C, 10-day shake-flask batch. mu_max=0.875 h-1 fitted from experimental dry-cell-weight data with the logistic model (growth_method=calculated). Doubling time=ln2/0.875=0.792 h. Xmax=14.74 g/L, X0=0.1 g/L. Cell yield Yxs=0.375 g/g, avermectin yield Yp/s=1.055, maintenance ms=0.027 g/g/h. Avermectin B1b is intracellular; beta (non-growth-associated production coeff)=11.36 mg/gDW/h, alpha=0 (non-growth-associated); max titer Pmax=130.01 mg/L.
